title: Settings
description: Layered settings.json overview (user / project / local) with key=value editing

raw.title: Quick write (key=value)
raw.hint: Value is parsed as JSON when possible, otherwise stored as a string

worktree.title: Worktree
worktree.note: --worktree launch isolation is a CLI flag; this only configures the on-disk baseRef/bgIsolation (2.1.133/2.1.143).

isolation.noneHint: Background sessions share the current workspace
isolation.worktreeHint: Each background session gets its own git worktree

toggles.title: Safety switches
toggles.disableBundledSkillsDesc: Hide Claude Code's built-in skills (settings.json disableBundledSkills, 2.1.169). Written to the user layer.
toggles.safeModeDesc: A CLI launch flag that disables all customizations for troubleshooting. Not a settings field — run `claude --safe-mode`; the tool cannot toggle it.
toggles.cdDesc: A CLI command that switches working directory without breaking the cache. Read-only note.
